nasb.text: But when they hand you over, do not worry about how or what you are to say; for it will be given you in that hour what you are to say.

esv.text: When they deliver you over, do not be anxious how you are to speak or what you are to say, for what you are to say will be given to you in that hour.

cnv.text: 你們被捕的時候，用不著擔心說甚麼和怎麼說，因為那時你們必得著當說的話；

ccb.text: 当你们被押送公堂时，不用顾虑如何应对，或说什么话，那时必会赐给你们当说的话。

csbs.text: 当他们把你们交出去的时候，不要忧虑怎样说或说什么。到时候，你们就会被赐予该说的话，
